controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - credit cards: issuance and conduct) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Credit Cards: Issuance and Conduct) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - credit cards: issuance and conduct) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to following non-banking financial company (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as an 'nbfc'), for all layers
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to following Non-Banking Financial Company
(hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as an 'NBFC'), for
all layers, unless specified otherwise:
Note: The applicability under these Directions is in line with the regulatory
structure for NBFCs as set out in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Registration, Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based
Regulation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to following non-banking financial company (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as an 'nbfc'), for all layers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be read along with prudential, payment and technology & cyber security related directions applicable to credit and co- branded cards, as issued by the
controls.control_description:
These Directions cover the general and conduct regulations relating to credit and
co-branded cards which shall be read along with prudential, payment and
technology & cyber security related Directions applicable to credit and co-
branded cards, as issued by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be read along with prudential, payment and technology & cyber security related directions applicable to credit and co- branded cards, as issued by the

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) add-on credit card means a supplementary credit card to the principal or primary credit card, issued to person/s with predefined relationship with the primary cardholder, within the credit limits and liability of the latter
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) Add-on Credit Card means a supplementary credit card to the principal or
primary credit card, issued to person/s with predefined relationship with the
primary cardholder, within the credit limits and liability of the latter, subject to
such terms and conditions as stipulated by the card-issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) add-on credit card means a supplementary credit card to the principal or primary credit card, issued to person/s with predefined relationship with the primary cardholder, within the credit limits and liability of the latter

controls.control_objective: To ensure the customer who has been issued credit card by a card-issuer and on whose name the card account has been opened
controls.control_description:
(19) Principal Cardholder means the customer who has been issued credit card
by a card-issuer and on whose name the card account has been opened.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the customer who has been issued credit card by a card-issuer and on whose name the card account has been opened

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as an unsolicited card
controls.control_description:
Provided that the issuance of a credit card for renewal or replacement shall
not be treated as an unsolicited card.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as an unsolicited card

controls.control_objective: To ensure enhancement in the benefits and features of credit cards issued, for example, an increase in the credit or cash limit of the card
controls.control_description:
(22) Upgradation of Credit Card means enhancement in the benefits and
features of credit cards issued, for example, an increase in the credit or cash
limit of the card.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to enhancement in the benefits and features of credit cards issued, for example, an increase in the credit or cash limit of the card

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve
Bank of India Act, 1934 or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or
as used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake credit card business without prior approval of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Non-Banking Financial Companies registered with the Reserve Bank shall not
undertake credit card business without prior approval of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake credit card business without prior approval of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure require a certificate of registration, apart from specific permission to enter into this business, the pre-requisite for which is a minimum net owned
controls.control_description:
Any
company including a non-deposit taking company intending to engage in this
activity shall require a Certificate of Registration, apart from specific permission
to enter into this business, the pre-requisite for which is a minimum net owned
fund of ₹100 crore and subject to such terms and conditions as the Reserve Bank
may specify in this regard from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require a certificate of registration, apart from specific permission to enter into this business, the pre-requisite for which is a minimum net owned

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue, credit cards, charge cards, or similar products virtually or physically
controls.control_description:
Without obtaining prior approval from
the Reserve Bank, NBFCs shall not issue, credit cards, charge cards, or similar
products virtually or physically.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue, credit cards, charge cards, or similar products virtually or physically

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a well-documented board approved policy for the issuance and conduct of credit cards
controls.control_description:
Each card-issuer shall have a well-documented Board approved policy for the
issuance and conduct of credit cards.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a well-documented board approved policy for the issuance and conduct of credit cards

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in consonance with various instructions on the subject issued by the reserve bank from time to time, as well as these directions
controls.control_description:
The Board approved policy shall be in
consonance with various instructions on the subject issued by the Reserve Bank
from time to time, as well as these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in consonance with various instructions on the subject issued by the reserve bank from time to time, as well as these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available on the website of the card-issuer
controls.control_description:
The Board approved policy shall
be available on the website of the card-issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available on the website of the card-issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, cover the following aspects: (1) interest rate ceiling and other charges
controls.control_description:
The policy should, inter alia, cover the following aspects:
(1) Interest rate ceiling and other charges.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, cover the following aspects: (1) interest rate ceiling and other charges

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a mechanism for review of their credit card operations on half-yearly basis by the audit committee of the board of directors
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall put in place a mechanism for review of their credit card
operations on half-yearly basis by the Audit Committee of the Board of Directors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a mechanism for review of their credit card operations on half-yearly basis by the audit committee of the board of directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure include, inter-alia, customer service, frauds, complaints and grievance redressal, card usage analysis including cards not used for long durations and
controls.control_description:
The review shall include, inter-alia, customer service, frauds, complaints and
grievance redressal, card usage analysis including cards not used for long
durations and the inherent risks therein.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include, inter-alia, customer service, frauds, complaints and grievance redressal, card usage analysis including cards not used for long durations and

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide a one-page key fact statement along with the credit card application containing the important aspects of the card such as rate of interest, qu
controls.control_description:
Customer Acquisition:
(1) Card-issuers shall provide a one-page Key Fact Statement along with the credit
card application containing the important aspects of the card such as rate of
interest, quantum of charges, among others.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide a one-page key fact statement along with the credit card application containing the important aspects of the card such as rate of interest, qu

controls.control_objective: To ensure convey in writing the specific reason/s which led to the rejection of the application
controls.control_description:
In case of rejection of a credit card
application, the card-issuer shall convey in writing the specific reason/s which
led to the rejection of the application.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to convey in writing the specific reason/s which led to the rejection of the application

controls.control_objective: To ensure be highlighted and published / sent separately to the customers, at the acceptance stage (welcome kit) and in important subsequent communications
controls.control_description:
(2) The MITC as given in Chapter VI of these directions, shall be highlighted and
published / sent separately to the customers, at the acceptance stage
(welcome kit) and in important subsequent communications.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be highlighted and published / sent separately to the customers, at the acceptance stage (welcome kit) and in important subsequent communications

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided to the customer (preferably in english, hindi and local language) at the time of onboarding and each time, a condition is modified with no
controls.control_description:
The MITC shall
be provided to the customer (preferably in English, Hindi and local language)
at the time of onboarding and each time, a condition is modified with notice to
the customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided to the customer (preferably in english, hindi and local language) at the time of onboarding and each time, a condition is modified with no

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sent to the registered email address of the cardholder holder or postal address as per the choice of the customer
controls.control_description:
The MITC and copy of the agreement signed /digitally signed
between the card-issuer and cardholder shall be sent to the registered email
address of the cardholder holder or postal address as per the choice of the
customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sent to the registered email address of the cardholder holder or postal address as per the choice of the customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider introducing, at the option of the customers, an insurance cover to take care of the liabilities arising out of lost cards, card frauds, etc
controls.control_description:
(3) Card-issuers may consider introducing, at the option of the customers, an
insurance cover to take care of the liabilities arising out of lost cards, card
frauds, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider introducing, at the option of the customers, an insurance cover to take care of the liabilities arising out of lost cards, card frauds, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain explicit consent in writing or in digital mode from the cardholders along with the details of nominee/s
controls.control_description:
In cases where the card-issuers are offering any insurance cover
to their cardholders, in tie-up with insurance companies, the card-issuers shall
obtain explicit consent in writing or in digital mode from the cardholders along
with the details of nominee/s.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain explicit consent in writing or in digital mode from the cardholders along with the details of nominee/s

controls.control_objective: To ensure only reverse the charges forthwith, but also pay a penalty without demur to the recipient amounting to twice the value of the charges reversed
controls.control_description:
In case, an
unsolicited card is issued / existing card upgraded and activated without the
<image>
explicit consent of the recipient and the latter is billed for the same, the card-
issuer shall not only reverse the charges forthwith, but also pay a penalty
without demur to the recipient amounting to twice the value of the charges
reversed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only reverse the charges forthwith, but also pay a penalty without demur to the recipient amounting to twice the value of the charges reversed

controls.control_objective: To ensure refrain from activating or providing consent for activation of card through otp or any other means
controls.control_description:
Explanation: In case a customer receives an unsolicited card, he / she should
refrain from activating or providing consent for activation of card through OTP
or any other means.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refrain from activating or providing consent for activation of card through otp or any other means

controls.control_objective: To ensure also intimate the customer that the credit card account has been closed
controls.control_description:
If no consent is received for activating the card, the card-
issuer is required to close the credit card account without any cost to the
customer within seven working days from the date of seeking confirmation from
the customer and shall also intimate the customer that the credit card account
has been closed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also intimate the customer that the credit card account has been closed

controls.control_objective: To ensure destroy the card
controls.control_description:
Subsequent to receiving the intimation from the card-issuer
that the card account has been closed, the customer shall destroy the card.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to destroy the card

controls.control_objective: To ensure be held responsible for the same
controls.control_description:
It is emphasised that any loss arising out of misuse of such unsolicited cards
shall be the responsibility of the card-issuer only and the person in whose name
the card has been issued shall not be held responsible for the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be held responsible for the same

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek one time password (otp) based consent from the cardholder for activating a credit card
controls.control_description:
(6)Card-issuers shall seek One Time Password (OTP) based consent from the
cardholder for activating a credit card, if the same has not been activated by
the customer for more than 30 days from the date of issuance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek one time password (otp) based consent from the cardholder for activating a credit card

controls.control_objective: To ensure close the credit card account without any cost to the customer within seven working days from date of seeking confirmation from the customer
controls.control_description:
If no consent is
received for activating the card, card-issuers shall close the credit card account
without any cost to the customer within seven working days from date of
seeking confirmation from the customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to close the credit card account without any cost to the customer within seven working days from date of seeking confirmation from the customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to payment of all dues by the cardholder
controls.control_description:
In case of a renewed or replaced card,
the closure of an inactivated card shall be subject to payment of all dues by the
cardholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to payment of all dues by the cardholder

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure prudence while issuing credit cards and independently assess the credit risk while issuing cards to persons, taking into account independent fi
controls.control_description:
Underwriting Standards:
(1) Card-issuers shall ensure prudence while issuing credit cards and
independently assess the credit risk while issuing cards to persons, taking into
account independent financial means of applicants.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure prudence while issuing credit cards and independently assess the credit risk while issuing cards to persons, taking into account independent fi

controls.control_objective: To ensure assess the credit limit for a credit card customer taking into consideration all the limits enjoyed by the cardholder from other entities on the basis
controls.control_description:
(2) As holding several credit cards enhances the total credit available to any
consumer, card-issuers shall assess the credit limit for a credit card customer
taking into consideration all the limits enjoyed by the cardholder from other
entities on the basis of self-declaration / credit information obtained from a
Credit Information Company, as appropriate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to assess the credit limit for a credit card customer taking into consideration all the limits enjoyed by the cardholder from other entities on the basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be uniformly applied as per the board approved policy of the card-issuer
controls.control_description:
This shall be uniformly applied as
per the board approved policy of the card-issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be uniformly applied as per the board approved policy of the card-issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure complete transparency in the conversion of credit card transactions to equated monthly instalments (emis) by clearly indicating the principal
controls.control_description:
(3) Card-issuers shall ensure complete transparency in the conversion of credit
card transactions to Equated Monthly Instalments (EMIs) by clearly indicating
the principal, interest and upfront discount provided by the merchant/card-
issuer (to make it no cost), prior to the conversion.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure complete transparency in the conversion of credit card transactions to equated monthly instalments (emis) by clearly indicating the principal

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be separately indicated in the credit card bill / statement
controls.control_description:
The same shall also be
separately indicated in the credit card bill / statement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be separately indicated in the credit card bill / statement

controls.control_objective: To ensure be camouflaged as zero-interest / no-cost emi
controls.control_description:
EMI conversion with
interest component shall not be camouflaged as zero-interest / no-cost EMI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be camouflaged as zero-interest / no-cost emi

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that loans offered through credit cards are in compliance with the instructions on loans and advances issued by the reserve bank from time to t
controls.control_description:
(4) Card-issuers shall ensure that loans offered through credit cards are in
compliance with the instructions on loans and advances issued by the Reserve
Bank from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that loans offered through credit cards are in compliance with the instructions on loans and advances issued by the reserve bank from time to t

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the credit limit as sanctioned and advised to the cardholder is not breached at any point in time without seeking explicit consent from th
controls.control_description:
(5) Card-issuers shall ensure that the credit limit as sanctioned and advised to the
cardholder is not breached at any point in time without seeking explicit consent
from the cardholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to ensure that the credit limit as sanctioned and advised to the cardholder is not breached at any point in time without seeking explicit consent from th

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given an option to enable or disable the option of overlimit through transaction control mechanism available on card-issuer's platforms such as int
controls.control_description:
Further, a cardholder shall be given an option to
enable or disable the option of overlimit through transaction control mechanism
available on card-issuer's platforms such as internet, mobile banking, or any
other suitable medium.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given an option to enable or disable the option of overlimit through transaction control mechanism available on card-issuer's platforms such as int

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue credit cards / charge cards to individuals for personal use together with add-on cards wherever required
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers may issue credit cards / charge cards to individuals for personal use
together with add-on cards wherever required.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue credit cards / charge cards to individuals for personal use together with add-on cards wherever required

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue business credit cards to business entities / individuals for business expenses
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers may issue business credit cards to business entities / individuals for
business expenses.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue business credit cards to business entities / individuals for business expenses

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued as charge cards / corporate credit cards
controls.control_description:
The business credit cards may be issued as charge cards /
corporate credit cards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued as charge cards / corporate credit cards

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place effective mechanism to monitor end use of funds
controls.control_description:
The card-issuers shall put in place effective mechanism to monitor end use of
funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place effective mechanism to monitor end use of funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure form part of their total assessed credits for compliance to instructions issued by the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - concen
controls.control_description:
The liability of the corporate / business entity on account of business cards shall
form part of their total assessed credits for compliance to instructions issued by
the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Concentration
Risk Management) Directions, 2025, as well as the Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and
Provisioning) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to form part of their total assessed credits for compliance to instructions issued by the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - concen

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued only to the persons specifically identified by the principal cardholder under both personal and business credit card categories
controls.control_description:
The add-on cards shall be issued only to the persons specifically identified by the
principal cardholder under both personal and business credit card categories.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued only to the persons specifically identified by the principal cardholder under both personal and business credit card categories

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued with the clear understanding that the liability will be that of the principal cardholder
controls.control_description:
Add-on cards shall be issued with the clear understanding that the liability will be
that of the principal cardholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued with the clear understanding that the liability will be that of the principal cardholder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly specified
controls.control_description:
Similarly, while issuing corporate credit cards, the
responsibilities and liabilities of the corporate and its employees shall be clearly
specified.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly specified

controls.control_objective: To ensure form part of its assessed credits
controls.control_description:
The liability of the corporate/business entity shall form part of its
assessed credits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to form part of its assessed credits

controls.control_objective: To ensure rest solely with the principal cardholder and not with the add-on cardholders
controls.control_description:
Explanation: The liability for dues shall rest solely with the principal cardholder
and not with the add-on cardholders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to rest solely with the principal cardholder and not with the add-on cardholders

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be governed as per fema regulations
controls.control_description:
However, settlement of dues towards
international credit card shall also be governed as per FEMA regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be governed as per fema regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure be honoured within seven working days by the credit card-issuer
controls.control_description:
Any request for closure of a credit card shall be honoured within seven working
days by the credit card-issuer, subject to payment of all dues by the cardholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be honoured within seven working days by the credit card-issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be immediately notified about the closure through email, sms, etc
controls.control_description:
Subsequent to the closure of credit card, the cardholder shall be immediately
notified about the closure through email, SMS, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be immediately notified about the closure through email, sms, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided option to submit request for closure of credit card account through multiple channels such as helpline, dedicated email-id, interactive vo
controls.control_description:
Cardholders shall be provided
option to submit request for closure of credit card account through multiple
channels such as helpline, dedicated email-id, Interactive Voice Response (IVR),
prominently visible link on the website, internet banking, mobile-app or any other
mode.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be provided option to submit request for closure of credit card account through multiple channels such as helpline, dedicated email-id, interactive vo

controls.control_objective: To ensure insist on sending a closure request through post or any other means which may result in the delay of receipt of the request
controls.control_description:
The card-issuer shall not insist on sending a closure request through post
or any other means which may result in the delay of receipt of the request.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to insist on sending a closure request through post or any other means which may result in the delay of receipt of the request

controls.control_objective: To ensure result in a penalty of ₹500 per calendar day of delay payable to the cardholder, till the closure of the account provided there is no outstanding in t
controls.control_description:
Failure
on the part of the card-issuers to complete the process of closure within seven
working days shall result in a penalty of ₹500 per calendar day of delay payable
to the cardholder, till the closure of the account provided there is no outstanding
in the account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to result in a penalty of ₹500 per calendar day of delay payable to the cardholder, till the closure of the account provided there is no outstanding in t

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide details regarding such outstanding dues to the cardholder upon receipt of the closure request without waiting for completion of the billing cy
controls.control_description:
Explanation: In case payment towards dues is outstanding, the card-issuer shall
provide details regarding such outstanding dues to the cardholder upon receipt
of the closure request without waiting for completion of the billing cycle and
accordingly advise him / her to make payment in order to complete the closure
process.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide details regarding such outstanding dues to the cardholder upon receipt of the closure request without waiting for completion of the billing cy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated after excluding the number of days taken by the cardholder to clear the outstanding dues
controls.control_description:
In such cases, the prescribed timeline of seven working days shall be
calculated after excluding the number of days taken by the cardholder to clear
the outstanding dues.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated after excluding the number of days taken by the cardholder to clear the outstanding dues

controls.control_objective: To ensure also report to cics suitably about the closure of the card account
controls.control_description:
The card-issuer shall also report to CICs suitably about the
closure of the card account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also report to cics suitably about the closure of the card account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be initiated after intimating the cardholder
controls.control_description:
If a credit card has not been used for a period of more than one year, the process
to close the card shall be initiated after intimating the cardholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be initiated after intimating the cardholder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be closed by the card-issuer
controls.control_description:
If no reply is
received from the cardholder within a period of 30 days, the card account shall
be closed by the card-issuer, subject to payment of all dues by the cardholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be closed by the card-issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure also accordingly be updated with the credit information company/ies within a period of 30 days
controls.control_description:
The information regarding the closure of card account shall also accordingly be
updated with the Credit Information Company/ies within a period of 30 days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also accordingly be updated with the credit information company/ies within a period of 30 days

controls.control_objective: To ensure be transferred to the cardholder's bank account
controls.control_description:
Subsequent to closure of credit card account, any credit balance available in
credit card accounts shall be transferred to the cardholder's bank account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be transferred to the cardholder's bank account

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain the details of the cardholder's bank account
controls.control_description:
Card-
issuers shall obtain the details of the cardholder's bank account, if the same is
not available with them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain the details of the cardholder's bank account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the reserve bank of india (nbfcs - interest rates on advances) directions, 2025 as amended from time to time, while determining the inter
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall be guided by the Reserve Bank of India (NBFCs - Interest
Rates on Advances) Directions, 2025 as amended from time to time, while
determining the interest rate on credit card dues.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the reserve bank of india (nbfcs - interest rates on advances) directions, 2025 as amended from time to time, while determining the inter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be justifiable having regard to the cost incurred and the extent of return that could be reasonably expected by the card-issuer
controls.control_description:
Interest charged on credit cards
shall be justifiable having regard to the cost incurred and the extent of return that
could be reasonably expected by the card-issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be justifiable having regard to the cost incurred and the extent of return that could be reasonably expected by the card-issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure also prescribe an interest rate ceiling in line with other unsecured loans, including processing and other charges, in respect of credit cards as part
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall also
prescribe an interest rate ceiling in line with other unsecured loans, including
processing and other charges, in respect of credit cards as part of their Board
approved policy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also prescribe an interest rate ceiling in line with other unsecured loans, including processing and other charges, in respect of credit cards as part

controls.control_objective: To ensure be transparency in levying such differential interest rates
controls.control_description:
In case card-issuers charge interest rates which vary based on
the payment / default history of the cardholder, there shall be transparency in
levying such differential interest rates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be transparency in levying such differential interest rates

controls.control_objective: To ensure be auditable
controls.control_description:
The interest rates as prescribed in the
board approved policy and the rationale for the same shall be auditable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be auditable

When card-issuers outsource various credit card related operations, they shall be
extremely careful that the appointment of such service providers do not
compromise the quality of the customer service and the card-issuers' ability to
manage credit, liquidity and operational risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be extremely careful that the appointment of such service providers do not compromise the quality of the customer service and the card-issuers' abilit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the need to ensure confidentiality of the customer's records, respect customer privacy and adhere to fair practices in debt collection
controls.control_description:
In the choice of the service
provider, the card-issuers shall be guided by the need to ensure confidentiality of
the customer's records, respect customer privacy and adhere to fair practices in
debt collection.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the need to ensure confidentiality of the customer's records, respect customer privacy and adhere to fair practices in debt collection

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a system of random checks and mystery shopping to ensure that their agents have been properly briefed and trained as to how to handle customers a
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall have a system of random checks and mystery shopping to
ensure that their agents have been properly briefed and trained as to how to
handle customers and are also aware of their responsibilities, particularly with
regard to soliciting customers, hours for calling, privacy of customer information,
conveying the correct terms and conditions of the product on offer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a system of random checks and mystery shopping to ensure that their agents have been properly briefed and trained as to how to handle customers a

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that their employees/agents do not indulge in mis- selling of credit cards by providing incomplete or incorrect information to the <image> cust
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall ensure that their employees/agents do not indulge in mis-
selling of credit cards by providing incomplete or incorrect information to the
<image>
customers, prior to the issuance of a credit card.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that their employees/agents do not indulge in mis- selling of credit cards by providing incomplete or incorrect information to the <image> cust

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be liable for the acts of their agents
controls.control_description:
The card-issuers shall also be
liable for the acts of their agents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be liable for the acts of their agents

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken on record by the card-issuer and appropriate action shall be initiated against them including blacklisting of such agents
controls.control_description:
Repetitive complaints received in this regard
against any employee / agent shall be taken on record by the card-issuer and
appropriate action shall be initiated against them including blacklisting of such
agents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken on record by the card-issuer and appropriate action shall be initiated against them including blacklisting of such agents

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available for the cardholders to raise complaints against any act of mis-selling or harassment by the representative of the card-issuer
controls.control_description:
A dedicated helpline and email-id shall be available for the cardholders
to raise complaints against any act of mis-selling or harassment by the
representative of the card-issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available for the cardholders to raise complaints against any act of mis-selling or harassment by the representative of the card-issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue other form factors in place of / in addition to a plastic credit card such as wearables, after obtaining explicit consent from the customer
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers may issue other form factors in place of / in addition to a plastic
credit card such as wearables, after obtaining explicit consent from the customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue other form factors in place of / in addition to a plastic credit card such as wearables, after obtaining explicit consent from the customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to all the specific and general guidelines applicable to the respective cards
controls.control_description:
Form factors shall be subject to all the specific and general guidelines applicable
to the respective cards.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be subject to all the specific and general guidelines applicable to the respective cards

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide options for disabling or blocking the form factor in line with the instructions issued by the reserve bank from time to time
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall provide options for disabling or blocking the form factor in line
with the instructions issued by the Reserve Bank from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide options for disabling or blocking the form factor in line with the instructions issued by the reserve bank from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be subject to the specific conditions applicable to such cards
controls.control_description:
In addition to the conditions listed herein, the co-
branding arrangement for credit cards and prepaid cards shall also be subject to
the specific conditions applicable to such cards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be subject to the specific conditions applicable to such cards

controls.control_objective: To ensure explicitly indicate that the card has been issued under a cobranding arrangement
controls.control_description:
The co-branded card shall explicitly indicate that the card has been issued under
a cobranding arrangement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to explicitly indicate that the card has been issued under a cobranding arrangement

controls.control_objective: To ensure advertise / market the co-branded card as its own product
controls.control_description:
The co-branding partner shall not advertise / market
the co-branded card as its own product.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to advertise / market the co-branded card as its own product

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly shown
controls.control_description:
In all marketing / advertising material,
the name of the card-issuer shall be clearly shown.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly shown

controls.control_objective: To ensure prominently bear the branding of the card-issuer
controls.control_description: The co-branded card shall prominently bear the branding of the card-issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prominently bear the branding of the card-issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the board approved policy of the card-issuer
controls.control_description:
The co-branding arrangement shall be as per the Board approved policy of the
card-issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be as per the board approved policy of the card-issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure specifically address issues pertaining to various risks, including reputation risk associated with such an arrangement and put in place suitable risk
controls.control_description:
The policy shall specifically address issues pertaining to various
risks, including reputation risk associated with such an arrangement and put in
place suitable risk mitigation measures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specifically address issues pertaining to various risks, including reputation risk associated with such an arrangement and put in place suitable risk

controls.control_objective: To ensure be indicated to the cardholder and also displayed on the website of the card- issuer
controls.control_description:
Further, the information relating to
revenue sharing between the card-issuer and the cobranding partner entity shall
be indicated to the cardholder and also displayed on the website of the card-
issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be indicated to the cardholder and also displayed on the website of the card- issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry out due diligence in respect of the co-branding partner entity with which they intend to enter into tie-up for issue of such cards to protect th
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall carry out due diligence in respect of the co-branding partner
entity with which they intend to enter into tie-up for issue of such cards to protect
themselves against the reputation risk they are exposed to in such an
arrangement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry out due diligence in respect of the co-branding partner entity with which they intend to enter into tie-up for issue of such cards to protect th

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that in cases where the proposed co- branding partner is a financial entity, it has obtained necessary approvals from its regulator for enterin
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall ensure that in cases where the proposed co-
branding partner is a financial entity, it has obtained necessary approvals from its
regulator for entering into the co-branding arrangement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that in cases where the proposed co- branding partner is a financial entity, it has obtained necessary approvals from its regulator for enterin

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be liable for the acts of the co-branding partner
controls.control_description: Card-issuers shall also be liable for the acts of the co-branding partner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be liable for the acts of the co-branding partner

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure adherence to reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - managing risks in outsourcing) directions, 2025, as amended from time to
controls.control_description:
The card-
issuer shall ensure adherence to Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025, as amended
from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure adherence to reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - managing risks in outsourcing) directions, 2025, as amended from time to

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that cash backs, discounts and other offers advertised by a co-branding partner are delivered to the cardholder on time
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall ensure that cash backs, discounts and other
offers advertised by a co-branding partner are delivered to the cardholder on time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that cash backs, discounts and other offers advertised by a co-branding partner are delivered to the cardholder on time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be liable for any delay or non-delivery of the same to the cardholders
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall be liable for any delay or non-delivery of the same to the
cardholders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be liable for any delay or non-delivery of the same to the cardholders

controls.control_objective: To ensure be limited to marketing / distribution of the cards and providing access to the cardholder for the goods / services that are offered
controls.control_description:
The role of the co-branding partner entity under the tie-up arrangement shall be
limited to marketing / distribution of the cards and providing access to the
cardholder for the goods / services that are offered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be limited to marketing / distribution of the cards and providing access to the cardholder for the goods / services that are offered

controls.control_objective: To ensure have access to information relating to transactions undertaken through the co-branded card irrespective of any other service offered by them to the ca
controls.control_description:
The co-branding partner (CBP) shall not have access to information relating to
transactions undertaken through the co-branded card irrespective of any other
service offered by them to the card-issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have access to information relating to transactions undertaken through the co-branded card irrespective of any other service offered by them to the ca

controls.control_objective: To ensure be involved in any of the processes or the controls relating to the co- branded card except for being the initial point of contact in case of grievanc
controls.control_description:
Post issuance of the card, the CBP
shall not be involved in any of the processes or the controls relating to the co-
branded card except for being the initial point of contact in case of grievances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be involved in any of the processes or the controls relating to the co- branded card except for being the initial point of contact in case of grievanc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be drawn directly from the card-issuer's system in an encrypted form and displayed in the cbp's platform with robust security
controls.control_description:
However, for the purpose of cardholder's convenience, card transaction related
data may be drawn directly from the card-issuer's system in an encrypted form
and displayed in the CBP's platform with robust security.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be drawn directly from the card-issuer's system in an encrypted form and displayed in the cbp's platform with robust security

controls.control_objective: To ensure be visible only to the cardholder and shall neither be accessed nor be stored by the cbp
controls.control_description:
The information
displayed through the CBP's platform shall be visible only to the cardholder and
shall neither be accessed nor be stored by the CBP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be visible only to the cardholder and shall neither be accessed nor be stored by the cbp

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required by the nbfcs registered with the reserve bank to become a co-branding partner of card-issuers
controls.control_description:
Prior approval shall not be required by the NBFCs registered with the Reserve
Bank to become a co-branding partner of card-issuers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required by the nbfcs registered with the reserve bank to become a co-branding partner of card-issuers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the conditions stipulated under paragraphs 55 and 56
controls.control_description:
The role of the co-
branding partner shall be as per the conditions stipulated under paragraphs 55
and 56.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the conditions stipulated under paragraphs 55 and 56

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep internal records to enable operations to be traced and errors to be rectified (taking into account the law of limitation for the time barred case
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall keep internal records to enable operations to be traced and
errors to be rectified (taking into account the law of limitation for the time barred
cases) as prescribed under Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to
time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep internal records to enable operations to be traced and errors to be rectified (taking into account the law of limitation for the time barred case

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided with a record of the transactions after he / she has completed it, immediately in the form of receipt or another form such as the bank sta
controls.control_description:
The cardholder shall be provided with a record of the transactions after he / she
has completed it, immediately in the form of receipt or another form such as the
bank statement / email / SMS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided with a record of the transactions after he / she has completed it, immediately in the form of receipt or another form such as the bank sta

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider issuing card with advanced features that may evolve from time to time
controls.control_description:
With a view to reducing the instances of misuse of lost / stolen cards, it is
recommended to the card-issuers that they may consider issuing card with
advanced features that may evolve from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider issuing card with advanced features that may evolve from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that a standard operating procedure is followed as approved by their board
controls.control_description:
In case card-issuers, at their discretion, decide to block / deactivate / suspend a
credit card, it shall be ensured that a standard operating procedure is followed as
approved by their Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that a standard operating procedure is followed as approved by their board

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be ensured that blocking / deactivating / suspending a card or withdrawal of benefits available on any card is immediately intimated to the cardh
controls.control_description:
Further, it shall also be ensured that blocking /
deactivating / suspending a card or withdrawal of benefits available on any card
is immediately intimated to the cardholder along with reasons thereof through
electronic means (SMS, email, etc.) and other available modes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be ensured that blocking / deactivating / suspending a card or withdrawal of benefits available on any card is immediately intimated to the cardh

controls.control_objective: To ensure block a lost card immediately on being informed by the cardholder and formalities
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall block a lost card immediately on being informed by the
cardholder and formalities, if any, can follow within a reasonable period clearly
defined in the Board approved policy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to block a lost card immediately on being informed by the cardholder and formalities

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide to the cardholder the detailed procedure to report the loss, theft or unauthorised use of card or pin
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall provide to the cardholder the detailed procedure to report the
loss, theft or unauthorised use of card or PIN.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to provide to the cardholder the detailed procedure to report the loss, theft or unauthorised use of card or pin

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide multiple channels such as a dedicated helpline, dedicated number for sms, dedicated e- mail-id, interactive voice response, clearly visible li
controls.control_description:
They shall provide multiple
channels such as a dedicated helpline, dedicated number for SMS, dedicated e-
mail-id, Interactive Voice Response, clearly visible link on the website, internet
<image>
banking and mobile-app or any other mode for reporting an unauthorized
transaction on 24 x 7 basis and allow the customer to initiate the blocking of the
card.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide multiple channels such as a dedicated helpline, dedicated number for sms, dedicated e- mail-id, interactive voice response, clearly visible li

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adequately publicized and included in the billing statements
controls.control_description:
The process for blocking the card, dedicated helpline as well as the SMS
numbers, shall be adequately publicized and included in the billing statements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adequately publicized and included in the billing statements

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately send a confirmation to the cardholder subsequent to the blocking of a card
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall immediately send a confirmation to the cardholder subsequent
to the blocking of a card.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to immediately send a confirmation to the cardholder subsequent to the blocking of a card

controls.control_objective: To ensure dispatch a card to a customer unsolicited
controls.control_description: A card-issuer shall not dispatch a card to a customer unsolicited.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to dispatch a card to a customer unsolicited

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided an option to decline the same if he / she wants to do so before dispatching the renewed card
controls.control_description:
In case of
renewal of an existing card, the cardholder shall be provided an option to decline
the same if he / she wants to do so before dispatching the renewed card.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided an option to decline the same if he / she wants to do so before dispatching the renewed card

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued with the explicit consent of the cardholder
controls.control_description:
Further,
in case a card is blocked at the request of the cardholder, replacement card in
lieu of the blocked card shall be issued with the explicit consent of the cardholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued with the explicit consent of the cardholder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided in a transparent manner including source of such benefits
controls.control_description:
Any discounts, cashbacks, reward points, loyalty points or any other benefits
offered by the card-issuer shall be provided in a transparent manner including
source of such benefits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided in a transparent manner including source of such benefits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be verifiable in the books of the card-issuer
controls.control_description:
The accounting process for the same shall be verifiable
in the books of the card-issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be verifiable in the books of the card-issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be displayed on the website of the card-issuer and a copy of the same shall also be provided to the cardholder
controls.control_description:
Detailed information regarding these benefits shall
be displayed on the website of the card-issuer and a copy of the same shall also
be provided to the cardholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be displayed on the website of the card-issuer and a copy of the same shall also be provided to the cardholder

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the relevant nomination details are recorded by the insurance company and the availability of insurance is included, along with other info
controls.control_description:
However, in case a card-issuer or a card payment network provides
an insurance cover, complimentary or chargeable (with the consent of the
cardholder), the card-issuer shall ensure that the relevant nomination details are
recorded by the Insurance Company and the availability of insurance is included,
along with other information, in every statement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the relevant nomination details are recorded by the insurance company and the availability of insurance is included, along with other info

controls.control_objective: To ensure also include the details regarding the insurance cover, name / address and telephone number of the insurance company which will handle the claims rela
controls.control_description:
The information shall also
include the details regarding the insurance cover, name / address and telephone
number of the Insurance Company which will handle the claims relating to the
insurance cover.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also include the details regarding the insurance cover, name / address and telephone number of the insurance company which will handle the claims rela

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided in the statements
controls.control_description:
In case of group insurance policy, the contact details of the
concerned officials of the card-issuer shall be provided in the statements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided in the statements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be contractual
controls.control_description: The relationship between the card-issuer and the cardholder shall be contractual.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be contractual

controls.control_objective: To ensure make available to the cardholders in writing, a set of contractual terms and conditions governing the issue and use of such cards
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall make available to the cardholders in writing, a set of
contractual terms and conditions governing the issue and use of such cards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make available to the cardholders in writing, a set of contractual terms and conditions governing the issue and use of such cards

controls.control_objective: To ensure be expressed clearly and also maintain a fair balance between the interests of the parties concerned
controls.control_description:
<image>
These terms shall be expressed clearly and also maintain a fair balance between
the interests of the parties concerned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be expressed clearly and also maintain a fair balance between the interests of the parties concerned

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mentioned in clear and simple language (preferably in english, hindi and the local language) comprehensible to the cardholder
controls.control_description:
The terms and conditions for the issue and usage of a card shall be mentioned
in clear and simple language (preferably in English, Hindi and the local language)
comprehensible to the cardholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mentioned in clear and simple language (preferably in english, hindi and the local language) comprehensible to the cardholder

controls.control_objective: To ensure levy any charge that was not explicitly indicated to the cardholder at the time of issue of the card and without getting his / her explicit consent
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall not levy any charge that was not explicitly indicated to the
cardholder at the time of issue of the card and without getting his / her explicit
consent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to levy any charge that was not explicitly indicated to the cardholder at the time of issue of the card and without getting his / her explicit consent

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to charges like service taxes which may subsequently be levied by the government or any other statutory authority
controls.control_description:
However, this shall not be applicable to charges like service taxes which
may subsequently be levied by the Government or any other statutory authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to charges like service taxes which may subsequently be levied by the government or any other statutory authority

controls.control_objective: To ensure be displayed on the card-issuer's website
controls.control_description:
The details of all the charges associated with cards shall be displayed on the
card-issuer's website.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be displayed on the card-issuer's website

controls.control_objective: To ensure be indicated to the cardholder in a transparent manner, prior to the transaction
controls.control_description:
The convenience fee, if any charged on specific transactions, shall be indicated
to the cardholder in a transparent manner, prior to the transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be indicated to the cardholder in a transparent manner, prior to the transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly specify the time-period for reversal of unsuccessful / failed transactions and the compensation payable for failure to meet the specified time
controls.control_description:
The terms shall clearly specify the time-period for reversal of unsuccessful / failed
transactions and the compensation payable for failure to meet the specified
timeline.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly specify the time-period for reversal of unsuccessful / failed transactions and the compensation payable for failure to meet the specified time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given to the cardholder to enable him / her to withdraw if he / she so chooses
controls.control_description:
The terms may be altered by the card-issuer, but 30 days' notice of the change
shall be given to the cardholder to enable him / her to withdraw if he / she so
chooses.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given to the cardholder to enable him / her to withdraw if he / she so chooses

controls.control_objective: To ensure be notified to the cardholder through all the communication channels available
controls.control_description:
The change in terms shall be notified to the cardholder through all the
communication channels available.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be notified to the cardholder through all the communication channels available

controls.control_objective: To ensure put the cardholder under an obligation to take all appropriate steps to keep the card safe and not to record the pin or code, in any form that would b
controls.control_description:
The terms shall put the cardholder under an obligation to take all appropriate
steps to keep the card safe and not to record the PIN or code, in any form that
would be intelligible or otherwise accessible to any third party if access is gained
to such a record, either honestly or dishonestly.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put the cardholder under an obligation to take all appropriate steps to keep the card safe and not to record the pin or code, in any form that would b

controls.control_objective: To ensure specify that the card-issuer shall exercise care when issuing pins or codes and shall be under an obligation not to disclose the cardholder's pin or code to anyone
controls.control_description:
The terms shall specify that the card-issuer shall exercise care when issuing PINs
or codes and shall be under an obligation not to disclose the cardholder's PIN or
code to anyone, except to the cardholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to specify that the card-issuer shall exercise care when issuing pins or codes and shall be under an obligation not to disclose the cardholder's pin or code to anyone

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be subject to relevant instructions on cash withdrawal, issue of international card, security issues and risk mitigation measures, card-to-card f
controls.control_description:
The issue of cards as a payment mechanism shall also be subject to relevant
instructions on cash withdrawal, issue of international card, security issues and
risk mitigation measures, card-to-card fund transfers, merchant discount rates
structure, failed ATM transactions, etc, issued by the Department of Payment and
Settlement Systems, Reserve Bank of India under the Payment and Settlement
Systems Act, 2007, and the Foreign Exchange Department, Reserve Bank of
India under Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999, as amended from time to
time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be subject to relevant instructions on cash withdrawal, issue of international card, security issues and risk mitigation measures, card-to-card f

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a grievance redressal mechanism within the card issuing entity and give wide publicity about it through electronic and print media
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall put in place a Grievance Redressal Mechanism within the card
issuing entity and give wide publicity about it through electronic and print media.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a grievance redressal mechanism within the card issuing entity and give wide publicity about it through electronic and print media

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mentioned on the credit card bills and account statements
controls.control_description:
The name, direct contact number, email-id and postal address of the designated
grievance redressal officer of the card-issuer shall be mentioned on the credit
card bills and account statements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mentioned on the credit card bills and account statements

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that grievances of cardholders are redressed promptly without any delay
controls.control_description:
The designated officer shall ensure that
grievances of cardholders are redressed promptly without any delay.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that grievances of cardholders are redressed promptly without any delay

controls.control_objective: To ensure be stipulated in the board approved policy for issuance of cards, redressal of grievances and compensation framework
controls.control_description:
Specific
timelines may be stipulated in the Board approved policy for issuance of cards,
redressal of grievances and compensation framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be stipulated in the board approved policy for issuance of cards, redressal of grievances and compensation framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure be displayed on the website of the card-issuer with a clearly visible link on the homepage
controls.control_description:
The grievance redressal
procedure and the Board approved policy shall be displayed on the website of
the card-issuer with a clearly visible link on the homepage.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be displayed on the website of the card-issuer with a clearly visible link on the homepage

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that their call centre staff are trained adequately to competently handle and escalate, a complaint
controls.control_description:
Card-issuers shall ensure that their call centre staff are trained adequately to
competently handle and escalate, a complaint, if necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that their call centre staff are trained adequately to competently handle and escalate, a complaint

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a provision for automatic escalation of unresolved complaints from a call center / base level to higher authorities
controls.control_description:
The Grievance
Redressal process shall have a provision for automatic escalation of unresolved
complaints from a call center / base level to higher authorities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a provision for automatic escalation of unresolved complaints from a call center / base level to higher authorities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a system of acknowledging customers' complaints for follow up, such as complaint number / docket number, even if the complaints are received over p
controls.control_description:
There shall be a
